gist.headline: Oasis in the feed
gist.blurb: Oasis AI just landed in the greenhouse. Turn those long-winded LinkedIn essays into snappy vertical video reels without breaking a sweat.
gist.summary: Added Oasis AI to the community apps directory, a tool for converting long-form social media posts into short vertical videos.
gist.impact: Creators can now automatically repurpose their written Twitter and LinkedIn content into engaging Instagram Reels.
gist.visual_concept: Oasis AI converts text to vertical video. Visuals: A desert oasis theme mixed with social media. The pollinations bee (Polly) wearing sunglasses, relaxing by a glowing pixel-art oasis pool. A chunky retro smartphone stands nearby, displaying a vertical video (Reel). Code-plants growing around the water.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky retro smartphone standing upright by a glowing blue oasis pool, displaying a vertical video on its screen. The cute bee mascot wears tiny sunglasses and relaxes nearby on a lime green (#ecf874) code-plant leaf. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
